title: Video shows effects of debris falling on a building in Tel Aviv
fullText: NewsFeedNew footage shows debris falling onto a residential building in Bnei Brak, east of Tel Aviv, as air raid sirens sounded across the city on the fourth day of fighting between Israel and Iran. Israeli forces have intercepted waves of Iranian missiles.Published On 3 Mar 2026
summary: New footage shows debris falling onto a residential building in Bnei Brak, east of Tel Aviv.
